blocks.body: Future Continuous Passive is used to describe actions that will continue at some point in the future. This form is used very rarely due to its awkward construction. Formula: will be being + V3.

{ "title": "9. Short summary", "items": [ "Future Continuous Passive: will be being + V3.", "⚠️ This form is almost not used in real communication.", "Reason: the construction is too clumsy (three forms in a row).", "Negation: will not be being + V3.", "Question: Will + Subject + be being + V3?", "Better to use: Future Simple Passive (will be done).", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Knowing this form is helpful for understanding, but not required to be actively used." ] }
